ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "virus_name" TEXT /* Name of the virus */,
  "accession_id" TEXT /* Accession ID of the sequence */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sequence was collected */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the host */,
  "passage_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the passage */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the specimen */,
  "additional_host_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the host */,
  "sequencing_technology_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the sequencing technology */,
  "assembly_method_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the assembly method */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments about the sequence */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment */,
  "lineage" TEXT /* Lineage of the sequence */,
  "clade" TEXT /* Clade of the sequence */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sequence was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sequence */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the laboratory */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sequence is a draft */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Score to indicate the quality of the sequence data */,
  "publicly_available" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sequence data is publicly available */,
  "contributors" TEXT /* JSON array to list the contributors to the sequence */,
  "references" TEXT /* JSON array to list any references or publications related to the sequence */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* JSON object to store additional annotations or metadata about the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_passage_id FOREIGN KEY ("passage_id") REFERENCES passages ("passage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_sequencing_technology_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequencing_technology_id") REFERENCES sequencing_technologies ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_assembly_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_method_id") REFERENCES assembly_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the laboratory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the laboratory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the laboratory was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the laboratory information */,
  "public_id" TEXT /* Public identifier for the laboratory */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the laboratory's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the laboratory's website */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the laboratory has been verified */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the laboratory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the host */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the host was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the host information */,
  "species" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomy ID from a standard taxonomy database */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat information of the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passages" (
  "passage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passage */,
  "passage_name" TEXT /* Name of the passage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the passage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the passage was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the passage information */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol for the passage */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the passage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimens" (
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen */,
  "specimen_name" TEXT /* Name of the specimen */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specimen */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the specimen was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the specimen information */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the specimen */,
  "preservation_method" TEXT /* Method used to preserve the specimen */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the specimen is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequencing_technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequencing technology */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequencing technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sequencing technology */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sequencing technology was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sequencing technology information */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sequencing technology */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sequencing technology */,
  "read_length" INTEGER /* Average read length for the technology */,
  "throughput" TEXT /* Throughput of the sequencing technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assembly method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the assembly method was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the assembly method information */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software used for assembly */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used during the assembly process */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the assembly method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link users to their laboratory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link versions to the sequence */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sequence */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link comments to the sequence */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link comments to the user */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_comments_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)
